channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Milton by the numbers: At least 5 dead, at least 12 tornadoes, 3.4M without power
item.description: Hurricane Milton’s explosive formation stirred high anxiety for Florida less than two weeks after Helene raked the state and much of the Southeast.
item.dc:creator: Mary Katherine Wildeman And Christopher L. Keller, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The Latest: Hurricane Milton is weaker but still dangerous
item.description: Hurricane Milton brought powerful winds, a dangerous storm surge and flooding to much of Florida after making landfall along the Gulf Coast as a Category 3 storm. It weakened to a Category 1 storm as it moved through Florida early Thursday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ethel Kennedy, social activist and wife of Robert F. Kennedy, has died
item.description: BOSTON, Mass. (AP) — Ethel Kennedy, the wife of Sen. Robert F. Kennedy, who raised their 11 children after he was assassinated and remained dedicated to social causes and the family’s legacy for decades thereafter, died on Thursday, her family said. She was 96.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY and STEVE LeBLANC, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris faces new urgency to explain how her potential presidency would be different from Biden's
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — With less than four weeks until Election Day, Vice President Kamala Harris is facing new urgency to define how her potential presidency would be different from that of President Joe Biden.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Biden tells Trump to 'get a life, man' and stop storm misinformation
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Joe Biden on Thursday publicly admonished Donald Trump, telling his predecessor to “get a life, man” and try to help people impacted by a pair of devastating hurricanes rather than spreading misinformation about the federal response.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Pulpit politics: When does it cross the line?
item.description: The lead pastor at a metro Grand Rapids megachurch got political in a recent sermon, urging his parishioners to run from the Democratic party.
item.dc:creator: Ken Kolker, NewsNation

item.title: Jeremy Strong and Sebastian Stan on 'The Apprentice': 'We're way out on a limb'
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Even in an election year, most seem to agree on one aspect about Ali Abbasi’s much-debated Donald Trump film “The Apprentice”: Sebastian Stan is a remarkably good Trump and Jeremy Strong is chillingly riveting as the New York power broker Roy Cohn.
item.dc:creator: JAKE COYLE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: What to know about Hurricane Milton after it slammed Florida's Gulf Coast
item.description: Florida residents and officials began assessing widespread damage Thursday after powerful Hurricane Milton brought strong winds, heavy rains and tornadoes as it moved toward the Gulf Coast and then barreled across the state. Gov.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Is next year’s Met Gala going to bite Anna Wintour in the back?
item.description: A video has surfaced of LeBron James saying “ain’t no party like a Diddy party," though the NBA star hasn't been linked to Combs' alleged crimes.
item.dc:creator: Paula Froelich, NewsNation

item.title: Morgan Wallen Foundation, Second Harvest donates 150,000+ pounds of food
item.description: In addition to the hands-on work, the team also operates a Virtual Food Drive that has collected 100,000 meals.
item.dc:creator: Kenzie Hagood, NewsNation

item.title: Prosecutors reviewing 'new evidence' in Marilyn Manson sexual abuse probe
item.description: The sex crimes division of the Los Angeles County District Attorney’s Office is reviewing new leads and evidence in the investigation into shock-rocker Marilyn Manson, who has been accused by multiple women, including “Westworld” actor Evan Rachel Wood, of sexual abuse, officials announced Wednesday
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KRON4

item.title: Immigrants brought to the US as children ask judges to keep protections against deportation
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Immigrants who grew up in the United States after being brought here illegally as children were among close to 200 demonstrators who gathered Thursday outside a federal courthouse in New Orleans, where three appellate judges heard arguments over the Biden administration's policy s
item.dc:creator: KEVIN McGILL and JACK BROOK, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Hurricane Milton disrupts Yom Kippur plans for Jews in Florida
item.description: WINTER PARK, Florida (AP) — Many Jews worldwide will mark Yom Kippur in fasting and prayer at their synagogues this weekend.
item.dc:creator: MARIAM FAM, GIOVANNA DELL'ORTO and HOLLY MEYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fisher-Price recalls over 2 million infant swings after 5 deaths reported
item.description: A recall has been issued for more than 2 million Fisher-Price infant swings after five deaths were reported.
item.dc:creator: Mac Bell, KRON4

item.title: Over 135 rescued from Tampa assisted living facility amid 'unprecedented' flooding from Milton
item.description: “This is extraordinary to see this type of flooding, especially in this type of area,” said Hillsborough County Sheriff Chad Chronister.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Human skull found on Utah mountain side by hunter
item.description: A hunter looking for antlers discovered a human skull on a mountainside near Brigham City, according to authorities.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, NewsNation

item.title: These Florida residents wouldn't evacuate from Milton - here's how they're doing
item.description: Floridians who decided to stay and ride out Hurricane Milton went viral on social media ahead of the storm this week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Police rescue 15 people from Tampa home after Milton knocks tree on house
item.description: Officers with the Tampa Police Department were sheltering a few miles when they were alerted to the incident via a 911 call.
item.dc:creator: Juan Cisneros, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Social Security announces 2.5 percent cost-of-living adjustment for 2025
item.description: Social Security recipients will see a 2.5 percent bump as part of their cost-of-living adjustment (COLA) for 2025.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris, Trump in virtual dead heat in major swing states
item.description: Vice President Harris and former President Trump are nearly tied in the major swing states that will play a deciding role in the election, according to polling released Thursday by The Hill and Emerson College Polling.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Milton knocks out power to millions and spawns slew of tornadoes. At least 5 dead
item.description: Hurricane Milton barreled into the Atlantic Ocean on Thursday after plowing across Florida, where it knocked out power to more than 3 million customers and whipped up a barrage of tornadoes.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: The Latest: Hurricane Milton is weaker but still dangerous
item.description: Hurricane Milton is bringing powerful winds, a storm surge and flooding to much of Florida after making landfall along the Gulf Coast as a Category 3 storm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Finding gas in Florida after Milton will be a challenge, analyst says
item.description: 63% of gas stations in the Tampa area are out of gas, and it could be weeks before they're resupplied.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, KRON4

item.title: Video: Wind tears roof off Tropicana Field, home of the Rays
item.description: Hurricane Milton made landfall in Siesta Key south of St. Petersburg, and while the city avoided some of the worst storm surges that doesn't mean the city avoided major effects from the storm.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, KRON4

item.title: Post-Milton gas in Florida will be a challenge: GasBuddy founder
item.description: 63% of gas stations in the Tampa area are out of gas, and it could be weeks before they're resupplied.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: More than 2 million without power as Hurricane Milton slams Florida, causes deaths and flooding
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Hurricane Milton plowed into Florida as a Category 3 storm Wednesday, bringing misery to a coast still ravaged by Helene, pounding cities with winds of over 100 mph (160 kph) after producing a barrage of tornadoes, but sparing Tampa a direct hit.
item.dc:creator: TERRY SPENCER and KATE PAYNE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Video: Hurricane Milton sucks water out of Tampa Bay
item.description: Tampa Bay experienced a rare reverse storm surge as Hurricane Milton made landfall Wednesday evening.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Taylor Swift donates $5 million to Hurricane Helene and Milton relief efforts
item.description: “This contribution will help communities rebuild and recover, providing essential food, clean water, and supplies to people affected by these devastating storms," Feeding America CEO Claire Babineaux-Fontenot said.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: 20 lbs. of cocaine found in truck floorboard at South Texas port of entry
item.description: A truck driven by a U.S. citizen had over 20 pounds of cocaine hidden in the floorboards as it tried to enter the South Texas border from Mexico, U.S. Customs and Border Protection officials said.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, WGN 9

item.title: Hurricane Milton makes landfall, slamming into Florida with destructive winds, catastrophic storm surge
item.description: More than 3 million people in Florida are without power Thursday morning as destructive Hurricane Milton is making its way across the state.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: California sea lion dies after being shot; police hunt for gunman
item.description: A California sea lion was shot and killed by a gunman in Orange County Monday, according to the NOAA. The male was around 2 years old and was shot in the back.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: COVID may increase risk of heart attack, death years after infection: study
item.description: COVID-19 could increase the risk of major cardiac events, like strokes and heart attacks, or death from any cause, according to a new study.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: TikTok is designed to be addictive to kids and causes them harm, US states' lawsuits say
item.description: More than a dozen states and the District of Columbia filed lawsuits against TikTok on Tuesday, saying that the popular short-form video app is designed to be addictive to kids and harms their mental health.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Why do people fill their bathtubs with water before a hurricane?
item.description: If you live in a hurricane-prone area, it may be common practice for you. If you live well outside that region, you may be confused by the move.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Chipotle announces the return of its ‘Boorito’ promotion
item.description: Chipotle is celebrating the spookiest of holidays with the return of its popular “Boo-rito” promotion. During the promotion, rewards members can purchase entrees for $6 and enjoy extended store hours. Only rewards members who order in-store can take advantage of the promo.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: States sue TikTok, alleging platform is addictive, harms kids' mental health
item.description: More than a dozen states and the District of Columbia sued TikTok on Tuesday, alleging the platform exploits and harms young users while "deceiving" the public about these dangers.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, Fox 5

item.title: Turning Point wants to revolutionize how Republicans turn out voters. Some are skeptical
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Turning Point’s representatives have made two things clear in meetings with state and local Republican leaders — Donald Trump has blessed their conservative organization to help lead his get-out-the-vote effort, and local party officials ought to use the group's new voter mobilizat
item.dc:creator: DAN MERICA and BRIAN SLODYSKO, Associated Press, ABC 4
